TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjacekes, title = Tjacekes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjacekes} }

S.FORM: Tjacekes i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjacekes. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjacekes sa, 83 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 278 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 273 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 95%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: tja ¶…ôk…ôs i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tja ¶…ôk…ôs. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tja ¶…ôk…ôs sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjacekes i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjacekes. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjacekes sa, 83 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 278 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 273 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 5 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 95%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: tja ¶…ôk…ôs i piŇčtuŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu tja ¶…ôk…ôs. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tja ¶…ôk…ôs sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, paiwan **%, zumazuma *%.
